title: quercus lenticellata
intro: Quercus lenticellata, also known as the Bur Oak or White Oak, is a species of deciduous tree in the family Fagaceae. The medicinal properties of Quercus lenticellata include its high content of tannins and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Quercus lenticellata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Quercus lenticellata can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis and skin issues.
